meaning: n.[军]多面堡,防御性障碍物
examples: The anxiety in the redoubt was profound.
They may be forced out of their redoubt in the city's Bakara market.
The redoubt of the Rue de la Chanvrerie, we repeat, seemed very calm within.
The Kurds would remain autonomous in their northern redoubt, retaining control over their peshmerga militias.
Kandahar was the Taliban's main redoubt even after the regime was toppled by a U.S.-led assault in 2001.
